mapper.select: SELECT maLuongTuyen, doPhucTap, khoangCachTu, khoangCachDen, luongCoBan FROM LuongTuyenDuong order by maLuongTuyen desc
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO LuongTuyenDuong (doPhucTap, khoangCachTu, khoangCachDen, luongCoBan) VALUES (#{doPhucTap}, #{khoangCachTu}, #{khoangCachDen}, #{luongCoBan})
